Bash(python3 -c "import json; b=json.load\(open\('/tmp/bundle.json'\)\); print\('manifest:', b['manifest']\); print\('navigation:', len\(b['site']['navigation']\)\); print\('sections:', len\(b['site']['sections']\)\); print\('languages:', len\(b['site']['languages']\)\); print\('images:', len\(b['site']['images']\)\); print\('logo:', bool\(b['site']['logo']\)\); print\('assets:', list\(b['assets'].keys\(\)\)\)")
